# Oshi Desk

Website: https://www.oshidesk.com/
Project type: Unofficial fan project
Product: Free desktop pet app for Windows and macOS

Oshi Desk lets users keep favorite characters close on the desktop. Characters walk, idle, react to sound, and link to creator channels.

Current fan-made characters (not official collaborations):
- Hebinyang (헤비냥)
- Ishalong (이샤롱)

Current version: 0.2.4

Supported platforms:
- Windows (portable exe)
- macOS Apple Silicon (dmg)
- macOS Intel (dmg)

Language home pages:
- Korean: https://www.oshidesk.com/ko/
- English: https://www.oshidesk.com/en/
- Japanese: https://www.oshidesk.com/ja/
- Traditional Chinese: https://www.oshidesk.com/zh-tw/

Subpages:
- Developer notes: https://www.oshidesk.com/developer-notes.html
- Creators (people who build oshi): https://www.oshidesk.com/creators.html
- Collaboration guide: https://www.oshidesk.com/collaboration.html
- Creator asset guide (Word): https://www.oshidesk.com/assets/OshiDesk_creator_guide.docx

Downloads: GitHub releases for Project-Undonghae/oshi-desk

Official social:
- X: https://x.com/Oshi_Desk

Contact:
- ssongshare0720@gmail.com

Origin project:
- DAP (Desk AI Pet): https://project-undonghae.github.io/desk-ai-pet/
